name: erp
description: Modular ERP for SMBs — Sales/CRM, HR/Payroll, Assets, Finance, Analytics

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @erp/api" "npm run dev -w @erp/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @erp/shared && npm run build -w @erp/api && npm run build -w @erp/web
